name: Reporting + Support Modules
manual_mismatches: Reports and reports-section prerequisites mixed read/view access with export action access (`reports.read` vs `customers.export`).
Reports common errors used exports-branch validation mapping instead of report branch-scope runtime restriction behavior.
Exports prerequisites were generic and omitted explicit `exports.write` and branch-scope branch-selection requirements.
Notes prerequisites omitted `notes.read` and overfocused on write/manage permissions.
Notes common errors were not aligned to route-reachable backend note validation failures.
Notifications prerequisites omitted `notifications.read`, and stream token failure guidance was incomplete.
Offline/offline-conflicts prerequisites were write-only and did not reflect read-vs-write split (`offline.read`/`offline.write`).
Session 7 Swahili prerequisites contained remaining English lines.
manual_fixes_applied: Updated reports and reports-section EN/SW prerequisites to split read/view permission from customer CSV export permission.
Updated reports and reports-section EN/SW common errors to context and branch-scope restriction outcomes.
Updated exports EN/SW prerequisites to explicit user-first `exports.write` and branch-scoped branch selection guidance.
Added `search.read` prerequisite in EN/SW Search entry.
Updated notes EN/SW prerequisites to read/write/manage split.
Updated notes EN/SW common errors to backend-aligned outcomes (`TITLE_AND_BODY_ARE_REQUIRED`, `NOT_ALLOWED_TO_EDIT_THIS_NOTE`, `INVALID_REMINDER_DATE`).
Updated notifications EN/SW prerequisites and error guidance to `notifications.read` + stream token/permission failures.
Updated offline and offline-conflicts EN/SW prerequisites to explicit `offline.read` versus `offline.write` split.
Translated all remaining Session 7 Swahili prerequisite lines to full Swahili.
Synchronized docs manual datasets to frontend runtime manual datasets.
